name: safeHref
description:
Validates an attribute value (defaults to an `<a href>`) and returns it only
when the value is safe to render. Delegates to `DOMPurify.isValidAttribute`
in the browser; falls back to a minimal scheme allow-list under SSR.

params.name: tag
params.description: Element name the value will be applied to (default: `'a'`)

returns.description: The original value if safe, `undefined` if blocked

title: safeHref
